heading: Reduction of credit for participation in or cooperation with an international boycott
label: 908 Reduction of credit for participation in or cooperation with an international boycott
notes: Amendments2017—Subsec. (a). struck out “902 or” after “or under section” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 115–97

Effective Date of 2017 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to taxable years of foreign corporations beginning after , and to taxable years of United States shareholders in which or with which such taxable years of foreign corporations end, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 115–97section 14301(d) of Pub. L. 115–97section 78 of this titleDec. 31, 2017

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–455, title X, § 1066(a)90 Stat. 1654Oct. 4, 1976“(1).—General ruleThe amendments made by this part (other than by section 1065) [enacting this section and and amending sections 952 and 995 of this title] apply to participation in or cooperation with an international boycott more than 30 days after the date of enactment of this Act [].section 999 of this titleOct. 4, 1976“(2).—Existing contractsIn the case of operations which constitute participation in or cooperation with an international boycott and which are carried out in accordance with the terms of a binding contract entered into before , the amendments made by this part (other than by section 1065) apply to such participation or cooperation after .”September 2, 1976December 31, 1977

children.text: the amount of the credit which, but for this section, would be allowed under section 901 for the taxable year, multiplied by
the international boycott factor (determined under section 999).

children.heading: Application with sections 275(a)(4) and 78
children.label: b Application with sections 275(a)(4) and 78
children.text: Section 275(a)(4) and section 78 shall not apply to any amount of taxes denied credit under subsection (a).
